name: Listening Insights
description: Beautiful Spotify listening dashboard with heatmaps, streaks, vibes, goals, recaps, recommendations, backups, and advanced taste insights.
icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none">
  <!-- Row 1 -->
  <rect x="3" y="3" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.3"></rect>
  <rect x="10" y="3" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.6"></rect>
  <rect x="17" y="3" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.2"></rect>
  <!-- Row 2 -->
  <rect x="3" y="10" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.8"></rect>
  <rect x="10" y="10" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="1"></rect>
  <rect x="17" y="10" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.5"></rect>
  <!-- Row 3 -->
  <rect x="3" y="17" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.4"></rect>
  <rect x="10" y="17" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.7"></rect>
  <rect x="17" y="17" width="4" height="4" rx="1" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.9"></rect>
</svg>
